payload.title: Drop-in CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md template for Trust projects
payload.description: A short, copy-pasteable template block that Trust-using projects put in their CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md so ANY agent (not just one with the skill installed) gets the essentials in-context: build with cargo trust not cargo, the syntax extensions exist, R-codes are teaching errors — read why:/instead: and retry, tests are exempt. Ship as docs/templates/CLAUDE-md-snippet.md, referenced from README and emitted by `trust new`. Keep it under ~30 lines — it lives in someone else's context budget.
